name: calendula officinalis
title: best benefits of calendula officinalis
description: Calendula officinalis treats minor cuts, which refers to the plant's ability to accelerate wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. This benefit is crucial as minor cuts can be painful and lead to more severe complications, such as infections or scarring, if left untreated or improperly cared for.
